## ⚠️ IMPORTANT

**For critical vulnerabilities** (exposed API keys, authentication bypass, data exposure), please use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](../../security/advisories/new) instead of this public issue.

This template is for **non-critical** security improvements and hardening suggestions.

---

## Security Issue Description

**Type of issue:**
- [ ] Exposed secret/credential
- [ ] Missing input validation
- [ ] Insecure dependency
- [ ] Missing security header
- [ ] Access control issue
- [ ] Other security improvement
